overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a foggy, ominous swamp at dusk. The environment features teal-colored fog, dead trees, wooden gallows posts, and a dramatic pink sunset visible briefly through the mist. The character moves steadily along a dirt path with two swords strapped to his back.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a dense, foggy forest trail. The environment is dominated by teal-colored fog and lush green bushes with yellow flowers lining the dirt path. Tall pine trees fade into the mist in the distance. Around the 10-second mark, wooden posts with red markers begin appearing along the path, hinting at the ominous nature of the swamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp clearing with execution posts at sunset

events.description: forest opens into a wide swampy clearing with dead trees and wooden gallows
sky becomes visible with dramatic pink and purple sunset colors breaking through the fog

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the open swamp area, passing wooden gallows posts with bodies hanging from them

entered.detail: dramatic sunset sky with vivid pink and purple hues visible through the clearing
twisted dead trees with bare branches silhouetted against the sky
twisted dead trees with bare branches silhouetted against the sky
tall wooden execution post with a body hanging from a rope
tall wooden post with red markers and remains

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a wide, ominous swamp clearing as the sky reveals a stunning pink and purple sunset. The vegetation changes to sparse, dead leafless trees, and disturbing wooden gallows posts with hanging bodies become prominent. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed forest to open, eerie wetland with the colorful sky creating a stark contrast against the dark, foggy ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense dead forest path with broken fences

events.description: sky returns to dark teal color as the character enters a denser section of dead forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding path through the dense dead forest, navigating past broken wooden barriers

entered.detail: thick cluster of dead trees creating a dark wall in the distance
decayed wooden fence posts and rails falling apart
decayed wooden fence posts and rails falling apart

segments.scene_description: As the pink sky fades back to dark teal, Geralt enters a denser section of the dead forest. The path becomes lined with broken wooden fences and the dead trees close in, creating a more enclosed and claustrophobic atmosphere. The teal fog returns thickly, obscuring the distant forest as the character continues walking steadily forward through the ominous swamp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest trail that opens into a haunting swamp clearing before closing back into a claustrophobic dead forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined with lush green bushes and yellow flowers, where tall pine trees gradually fade into a thick teal fog and red-marked wooden posts appear. As the forest opens, the scene expands into a wide, eerie wetland under a vivid pink and purple sunset, shifting the landscape toward sparse, leafless trees and grim gallows posts with hanging bodies. The atmosphere then shifts as the colorful sky fades back to dark teal and the camera moves into a denser section of the swamp. Finally, the environment becomes enclosed by broken wooden fences and crowding dead trees, with the heavy teal fog returning to obscure the distance as the character continues forward.
